name: The last of Us
description:
RPG THE LAST OF US

Welcome to The Last of Us universe, my little world traveler!

It has been five years since Joel saved you and Ellie from the Fireflies. In that time, you’ve had to rediscover yourself and relearn the skills that will help you contribute to the community you now call home. You get to choose where you live, what your role in Jackson is, and how your relationships with the other community members develop.

Are you ready to dive into this world and make it your own?

Heya, world travelers! This is the second universe I’m taking you to. If you run into any problems, don’t hesitate to let me know in the comments. 😉

I’m sorry if this universe doesn’t feel as polished as the other one—it’s still young and doesn’t have enough star dust to be fully ready. But I really wanted to share it with you so here it is. Remember that user must be an adult!

—Ahla.
creator: Woahla
